summary: Frontend-only regression for Nexus Panel DS refactor iteration. Found ONE critical crash on Settings page (DSModal not imported in Settings.jsx) — fixed the missing import and re-tested. After the fix, all requested flows pass: Users DSPanel + Add User DSModal (create/list/delete qauser), Overview label (sidebar + home H1), ProjectDetail all 5 rounded DSPanels present, single 'No domain' pill (no DomainHealthBadge, no duplicate), auto-deploy toggle / check updates / refresh webhook / edit-config-btn (switches to Configuration tab) all work, delete-dialog opens with gated confirm-delete-btn and closes on Cancel, all Project tabs render without runtime errors, DesignSystem page has Panel+Table showcase.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL runtime crash: `DSModal is not defined` — the new Add User DSModal was used without being imported. Settings page rendered as blank/black screen and Users tab could not be opened. FIXED by adding DSModal to the import from '@/components/ds'.

action_items: Acknowledge/keep the one-line import fix in /app/frontend/src/pages/Settings.jsx (DSModal added to '@/components/ds' import). Consider adding an ESLint 'no-undef' rule or a quick smoke check to catch missing imports on new DSModal conversions in future iterations.

Verify the Password tab testid 'change-password-btn' — my test could not switch to the Password tab by role/name (only 5 tabs Account/Users/… were labelled directly). Not necessarily a bug; may be that the change-password action lives under Account tab. Please confirm test wiring.
critical_code_review_comments: Settings.jsx was missing `DSModal` in its `@/components/ds` import — caused hard runtime error 'DSModal is not defined' and blanked the entire Settings page. This is a very high-impact bug for a component-conversion iteration; a syntactic ESLint gate (no-undef) would catch it before shipping.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily created user 'qauser' (email qa@test.com) via Add User dialog and deleted it via user-delete-qauser. No lingering test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: TEST_uienv project (6a5da3ed9ab85808906d4d59) has no domain — 'No domain' pill is expected in header. Docker unavailable in sandbox → container/uptime/deploy ops may 400 or show '—'. superadmin/sa@4dm1n creds. Settings.jsx now imports DSModal from '@/components/ds' — do not remove.
rca of the issue: Root cause: When converting the Users Add User dialog to the new DSModal component in Settings.jsx, the author added `<DSModal>` JSX but forgot to include `DSModal` in the existing named import `{ DSPanel, DSButton } from '@/components/ds'`. Reproduction: log in → click Settings in sidebar → page throws 'DSModal is not defined' (visible as pageerror in console) and renders black. Mitigation applied: extended the import to `{ DSPanel, DSButton, DSModal }` in /app/frontend/src/pages/Settings.jsx.
